title: SHARED.md Update — Last updated: 2026-04-13 by InkThorn main agent (topic 2)
body:
**Who Is Rob**
- **Full name:** Rob Gaudet

**How Rob Thinks**
- Bias toward action — doesn't wait for permission

**How To Talk To Rob**
- Warm but direct — no fluff

**Active Projects**
- Built in one week via OpenClaw

**Rob's Personal Finance System**
- Cloud drive structure: `Gaudet Finances / [Year] / [Category]`

**Rob's Voice (use in writing)**
- "I'm actually a Silicon Valley engineer — but building with AI, I didn't use any of that. I was more of a poet."

**Key Rules for All Agents**
- Keep **nonprofit and commercial contexts completely separate**
